testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //input[@autocomplete='one-time-code' or @type='tel']' (tried for 60 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
